title: analytics — settings
description: Tenant-facing analytics settings. Small config surface — most configuration lives on AnalyticsProviderConfig rows. This settings group governs tenant-wide behaviors: default consent gate strictness, custom-webhook allowed domains, funnel defaults.

sections.label: Consent enforcement
sections.description: How strictly the consent gate treats missing / stale consent.

fields.name: consent_strict_mode
fields.label: Strict consent mode
fields.helpText: When on, subjects with no explicit consent decision are treated as suppressed (fail-closed). When off, no-decision subjects are captured while awaiting decision (fail-open). GDPR-strict tenants keep this on.

fields.name: consent_recheck_on_dispatch
fields.label: Recheck consent at dispatch time
fields.helpText: Default on. Suppresses events whose subject withdrew consent between capture + dispatch. Off = honors the capture-time snapshot only.

sections.label: Custom webhook
sections.description: Settings for the custom_webhook provider driver.

fields.name: custom_webhook_allowed_egress_domains
fields.label: Allowed egress domains
fields.helpText: Comma-separated list of https:// domains the custom_webhook driver may POST to. Any provider config pointing outside this list is refused. Anti-exfiltration control.

sections.label: Funnel + experiment defaults
sections.description: Default window + confidence-level for funnel + experiment queries.

fields.name: experiment_confidence_level
fields.label: Statistical confidence level
fields.helpText: Used in ExperimentAssignmentReportBuilder for p-value + confidence interval computation.

sections.label: Session recording
sections.description: PostHog session recording opt-in. Independently requires analytics_session_recording entitlement + subject functional consent.

fields.name: session_recording_enabled
fields.label: Enable session recording
fields.helpText: Master toggle. Requires Enterprise plan + subject-level `functional` consent. Provider config also needs enable_session_recording=true.

fields.name: session_recording_mask_all_text
fields.label: Mask all text
fields.helpText: PostHog session-recording setting. On = all text redacted (default; safer). Off = free-form text captured. Never captures inputs with type=password regardless.
